description: AtomcraftEnergy — Nuclear Power Business Group. Pressurised water reactor operations: reactor core, primary/secondary circuit, turbine-generator, cooling towers, spent-fuel handling. Functional branches: _kpi (capacity factor, availability), _safety (trip systems, interlocks), _energy, _maint.

tree.name: acme-enterprise
tree.description: AcmeEnterprise root — rename to your enterprise name

children.name: AtomcraftEnergy
children.description: AtomcraftEnergy — nuclear power generation. Pressurised water reactors providing baseload electricity. Two operational stations.

children.name: krypton-station-01
children.description: Krypton Station 01 — twin-unit PWR nuclear power station. 2 x 1200 MWe. Primary and secondary circuits, cooling towers, turbine hall.

children.name: reactor-building
children.description: Reactor building — primary circuit, reactor core and containment. ISA-95 L3.

children.name: primary-circuit
children.description: Primary coolant circuit — reactor vessel, RCP pumps, pressuriser. L4.

children.name: reactor-unit-01
children.description: Reactor unit 01 — PWR core, control rods, thermal power instrumentation. L5.

children.name: _safety
children.description: Functional branch — nuclear safety systems. IEC 62443 / nuclear-grade interlocks. RESTRICTED access. Safety actuation, emergency core cooling, area radiation monitoring. Topic: acme-enterprise/AtomcraftEnergy/krypton-station-01/_safety/...
